ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance test */,
  "strat" TEXT /* Strategy used for the test (e.g., Random) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the test */,
  "num_workers" INTEGER /* Number of workers in the test */,
  "num_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests in the test */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed value for the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test for documentation and reference */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* The current status of the test (e.g., planned, running, completed, failed) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the test is conducted (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "test_start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the test */,
  "test_end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the test */,
  "test_frequency" TEXT /* How frequently the test is scheduled to run (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "test_creator_id" INTEGER /* The user who created the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_tests_test_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_creator_id") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance test associated with the metrics */,
  "avg_wait_time" REAL /* Average wait time during the test */,
  "max_wait_time" REAL /* Maximum wait time during the test */,
  "num_failed" INTEGER /* Number of requests that failed during the test */,
  "min_wait_time" REAL /* Minimum wait time during the test */,
  "95th_percentile_wait_time" REAL /* 95th percentile of wait times */,
  "99th_percentile_wait_time" REAL /* 99th percentile of wait times */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Number of requests processed per second */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Percentage of successful requests */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage during the test */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test conducted */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric entry recorded for this test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* The status of the test result (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test result */,
  "result_version" TEXT /* Version of the test configuration used */,
  "result_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in milliseconds */,
  "result_cpu_time" REAL /* Total CPU time used during the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES test_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy (e.g., Random) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* The current status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "strategy_created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the strategy was created */,
  "strategy_updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the strategy was updated */,
  "strategy_creator_id" INTEGER /* The user who created the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_strategy_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_creator_id") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker (e.g., Worker 1) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the worker in handling requests */,
  "worker_status" TEXT /* The current status of the worker (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "worker_last_heartbeat" TEXT /* The last time the worker sent a heartbeat signal */,
  "worker_created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the worker was created */,
  "worker_updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the worker was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failed_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each failed request */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance test associated with the failed request */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message received during the failed request */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the failed request occurred */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* The type of request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* The URL of the request */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* The HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST, PUT) */,
  "request_payload" TEXT /* The payload of the request */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* The HTTP response code */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* The response message from the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_failed_requests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)
